name: General Oyster, Inc.
summary: General Oyster, Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the food and beverage business in Japan. It also engages in the processing and wholesale of oysters; and land cultivation, seed and seedling production, and sea aquaculture businesses. In addition, the company operates a chain of oyster bar restaurants. General Oyster, Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
